posts.text:
Building 10 Hyperions in parallel over 2-3 months is ~ 40 Hyperions a year. Capacity per unit grow from 10 to beyond 20 tonnes per Hyperion. 

So, 12 months 400 to likely 800 tonne capacity growth. 

Question to be asked… what will it take? How much staff and factory build space will it take to build 20 in parallel or 100 in parallel?  

Can we target a few years out to add 5000 - 10000 tonnes of capacity in a single year? 

Does it make sense to contract with a build partner to ramp up Hyperion building and testing?  For example seek to work with a major auto company your partner with to form an assembly line system for building Hyperions?
posts.author: BambroughKevin
